title: submit_gate_request Request
description: Request a review gate to be executed for a PR. Sent as JSON body on POST /v1/projects/:project_id/review-gates. The daemon enqueues the gate; T0 submits the request.

id.description: Client-assigned request_id. Used for idempotency — submitting the same id twice is a no-op.

pr_number.description: GitHub PR number, required for gemini_review and codex gates.

contract_hash.description: Hash of the gate contract doc, for reproducibility.

changed_files.description: File paths changed in the PR.
